greetings online friends
i hate those things
nice cat condo
never been but that's cool
mmm hmm
the worst
as is tradition
i get a free $1 too? sold
was the gameboy printer that expensive?
me and my neighbors relationship fr
almost broke my laptop screen due to this
classic Debra
i really dislike this
legend
helps if you've seen Steven King's Maximum Overdrive
no idea what that means
i did know that actually
that's my time.. have a great weekend gang!!

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Saturday WHOLESOME Dump To Make You Smile (Chill Day #481)
item.description:
1. Every office should have a place where you can take a 10 minute brake like that
2. Amazing slippers, where can I buy these?
3. Clever kid does a trick to get in the fun club
4. Girl just wants to stay home with daddy (she is all of us)
5. Amazing love story
6. This is Frank Petersen, first black man to be named general of the U.S. Marines.
7. Neat thing to learn :) Wait, do Imgur servers run on lava lamps?
8. Just a man and his BAT DOG
9. Dog listens to his daily performance report
10. Useful tip for fellow US imgurians
11
12. A very creative way to use shadows
13. Selfish beaver chonky boi
14. Scissoring a silhouette
15. This menu: I started adding characters showing up in the main menu to feel more "alive" ? You can hear the honk and some music if you turn on the sound. P.S. It's never to late to be creative. What are you passionate about? For me it's game dev and I'm currently working on a silly Stanley Parable -inspired game with my brother. I basically learned Unreal Engine from scratch just so I can make games like the ones that made me happy as a kid (I'm in my 30s now). If you like to help us please wishlist the game on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_Or_Youll_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S. Have a great rest of the week. Don't forget to hydrate and be mindful of negative thoughts.

item.title: Google the lyrics...
item.description: In 1972, Italian singer Adriano Celentano released “Prisencolinensinainciusol,” a song with nonsense lyrics meant to sound like English. The idea was to see if Italians would like any song that sounded American, regardless of the lyrics’ meaning. It became a huge hit in Italy and across Europe, reaching number one in Italy and charting in other countries like the UK. The song mixed funk, soul, and early hip-hop, with Celentano improvising gibberish lyrics over a catchy beat. His performances on TV helped spread its popularity, and the song became a cultural meme decades later, reflecting the era’s love for American music.
item.dc:creator: BenntheNinja

item.title: (Insert unique title here)A meme dump.
item.description:
A sheep, drum, and snake fall off cliff…ba dum tsss. FP edit: I really hope as shitty as our situation is I sincerely hope that we’re living during the ‘Bell riots’ period and eventually we’ll have starships. Love your neighbors folks.
(Swoons)
Love and miss you Space Mom.
Louder for the people in the back.
The old world is dying, the new one struggles to be born. Now is the time of monsters.
Always remember that the urge to sing “the lion sleeps tonight“ is only just a whim away, a whim away, a whim away…
…realizing I’m an NPC because I repeat the same few phrases, have repetitive tasks, and frequently bump into walls/doors.
Makes me think of Joker’s song from The Laughing Joke.
The struggle is real.
What do you say when someone approaches you…? The audacity.
If the pizza man truly loves this babysitter why does he keep slapping her rear?
Soul worth about $3.50
Now I can only hear it in Simlish.
Being kind to one another is punk as fuck.
Seriously, all these billionaires and no superheroes… Just Wish Lex Luther
Lower Decks. Out of all the sci-fi I love Star Trek the most because it has hope.
Sign me up tin man!
Doors are the real BBEG.
Joker didn’t realize that Red Skull is an actual Nazi and it’s not some shtick so he stops what he’s doing and fights him. Be like Joker.
Fun fact: The line from Midnight Cowboy was improvised when a real New York City cab driver drove through the shot while Hoffman and his co-star were crossing the street.
You merely adopted neurospiciness. I was born into it, molded by it.
They make the rockin’ world go ‘round.
Ren & Stimpy for me.
Fun fact #2: his tongue sucking gesture was also improvised.
But the ocean has meat and veggies and is cold…the ocean is gazpacho, change my mind.
Fuck yeah they do!
Thanks for your time. Hope your day is effulgent.
item.dc:creator: DaymanAhAAAAah

item.title: Working on getting stronger.
item.description: It wasn't perfect to but by the end it was much better. I hope everyone is having a great day and has a wonderful weekend. Thank you I really appreciate the encouragement and support.

item.title: Electricity
item.description: That's not me, it's Carolyn Rupp. She IS the groove.
item.dc:creator: TheOneWhoWasLeft

item.title: It will get worse before it gets better
item.description: When I was little, I didn't know I wasn't supposed to be here. My favorite hero was Captain Marvel because Superman was a ham handed overly preachy comic to me. But he was my brothers favorite hero, and as an adult, I know why. He made him feel a lot better and maybe these will make someone else feel better too.
item.dc:creator: scamlikley

item.title: Pre-Oct.7th confessions from IDF soldiers.
item.description: Source is Breaking The Silence, an Israeli organization that advocates for IDF soldiers and an end to Israeli expansionism on moral grounds. Don't be fooled though; while they claim to want to end the needless suffering, it's mainly the suffering of IDF soldiers that they want to alleviate. Breaking The Silence is Pro-Israel, anti-accountability & portrays the perpetrators of atrocities as the true victims. https://www.breakingthesilence.org.il/
item.dc:creator: NunyaBNess1

item.title: Images of Note: With the power of friendship we can kill God!
item.description:
an expert
LET'S KILL GOD!
Still is a pretty good satire
do more weird shit
All hail Chum
fucking kek
It was so wimdy yesterday there's BITS OF SOMEONE ELSE'S SHED IN MY GARDEN
Yeah, yesterday was scary af, also getting that EAS alert
basically
this. this is amazing
"Why didn't the Wright brothers just buy a drone" energy
PISS!
sdfsdfsdfsdaffsd
7
OwO
Anyone who says otherwise is a heretic who will be burnt at the stake for their heresy.
Sind Sie das Essen? Nein, wir sind die Jäger!
